response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings approximately 17 years of broad software engineering experience, a genuine entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder), and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy and advising enterprise customers at scale — areas where the candidate's profile is thin. His titles have remained at Senior/Staff Software Developer level throughout his career, he holds no advanced AI/ML degree, and his cloud platform expertise is not evident. The AI involvement is real but recent and tooling-focused rather than strategic.
strengths: ~17 years of continuous hands-on delivery across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with genuine polyglot depth
Entrepreneurial history including founding GISCollective and early-stage startup contributions (WatchUp, Apon), aligning with the preferred intrapreneurial profile
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, demonstrating current engagement with the AI tooling ecosystem
concerns: Career titles have stayed at Senior/Staff Software Developer level — no evidence of Director-level IC scope, executive advisory experience, or organizational influence at the scale this role demands
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and AI involvement is recent (2025–present) and infrastructure-focused rather than reflecting deep ML expertise or recognized AI platform leadership

No demonstrable cloud platform expertise at enterprise scale — no AWS/GCP/Azure architectural leadership visible, which is central to the role's responsibility of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: No advanced AI degree or recognized AI expertise
